title: Functions
summary: 9709 P1 functions — domain, range, composite and inverse functions with PhET function builder.
learningObjectives: Find inverse functions where they exist.
Apply the vertical line test and one-to-one condition.

simpleExplanation.title: Input–output rules
simpleExplanation.summary: A function maps each input to exactly one output. Composites nest functions; inverses undo the mapping when one-to-one.
steps: Domain: all valid x; range: all outputs f(x) achieved.
Inverse: swap x and y, rearrange — domain of f⁻¹ = range of f.

sections.content: **Functions** (1.2) underpin almost every 9709 paper. Examiners combine **composite** and **inverse** in one question — define domains explicitly.
